HomePage.faq1A: Да, абсолютно бесплатно. Никаких скрытых платежей. terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.section1Body: By accessing and using the Global Devis Invoice Generator ("the Service"), you explicitly accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provisions of this agreement. If you do not agree to abide by these terms, please do not use this service.
terms.section2Body: Global Devis provides a decentralized, browser-based tool allowing users to natively generate, format, and download standard PDF invoices. We offer this tool completely free of charge.
terms.section3Body: You acknowledge that the Service is provided "as is". While our calculations aim to be highly accurate, you are solely responsible for ensuring the legal, mathematical, and tax accuracy of the final invoices you distribute to your clients. We explicitly disclaim all liability for disputes, penalties, or damages arising from incorrect use of our templating engine.
terms.section4Body: The fundamental design, layout, graphics, and underlying source code running the Service are owned by us and are protected by applicable copyright and trademark law. You may not claim ownership over the Service itself, although you retain complete proprietary ownership over the specific business data and logos you inject into your generated PDFs.
terms.section5Body: We reserve the right to explicitly modify, suspend, or discontinue the Service at any time with or without prior notice. We shall not be liable to you or any third party for any modification, suspension, or discontinuance of the Service.
terms.section6Body: For legal or support requests, contact us at

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1Body1: When you use our Free Invoice Generator, the data you enter (such as your business name, client details, and financial figures) is processed entirely locally within your web browser. We do not store, transmit, or save your generated invoices on our remote servers.
privacy.section1Body2: We may passively collect non-personally identifiable information, such as browser type, device type, and operating system, purely for analytical purposes to improve our services.
privacy.section2Body: We use browser Local Storage to save your invoice drafts so you do not lose your progress if you close the tab. We also use cookies and similar tracking technologies to analyze traffic securely and serve personalized advertisements.
privacy.section3Body1: We use Google AdSense to display advertisements on our website. Google, as a third-party vendor, uses cookies to serve ads based on your prior visits to our website or other websites. Google's use of advertising cookies enables it and its partners to serve ads to our users.
privacy.section3Body2: You may explicitly opt out of personalized advertising by visiting the Google Ads Settings.
privacy.section4Body: If you are located in the European Economic Area (EEA), you have explicit rights to access, rectify, or erase any personal data we might hold. However, because our core invoice generation service operates locally, we inherently do not possess a database of your invoices to begin with. You have complete control over your cookie preferences via the consent banner available upon your first visit.
privacy.section5Body: We do not run a mandatory account system for invoice generation, and we do not store invoice drafts on our servers by default. Invoice data is kept in your browser for local usage unless you explicitly use optional cloud features.
